name: shared note opens for signed-out visitors

steps.name: API should create a note for the share-link scenario
API-created note card should be visible in the notes list getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Shared note 1784292633991-d8156e' }).first()
Reading view should be visible after opening the API-created note getByRole('heading', { name: 'Reading' })
Reading view should display the expected note body before sharing locator('.note-content')
Reading view should display tag "share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-one" before sharing getByTestId('editor-container').getByText('share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-one', { exact: true })
Reading view should display tag "share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-two" before sharing getByTestId('editor-container').getByText('share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-two', { exact: true })
Share note menu item should be visible after clicking more actions getByRole('menuitem', { name: 'Share note' })
Accessibility scan on "More Actions Menu" should have no violations
Share note dialog should be visible after choosing Share note from more actions getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Share note' })
Share note dialog title should be visible getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Share note' }).getByRole('heading', { name: 'Share note' })
Share note dialog should generate a public share link getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Share note' }).getByLabel('Public link')
Copy share link button should become enabled after link generation getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Share note' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy share link' })
Accessibility scan on "Share Dialog" should have no violations
Generated public link should target the share page
verify a guest browser is signed out
Share note dialog should close before opening the link as a guest getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Share note' })
Test login button should be visible in the separate guest browser context getByRole('button', { name: 'Test Login (Persistent)' })
Guest browser context should not show the authenticated test user email getByText('test@example.com', { exact: true })
open public link and verify shared content
Public share link should navigate to the shared note route
Public page header should be visible for a signed-out visitor getByTestId('public-page-header')
Public note page should label the content as a shared note getByText('Shared note', { exact: true })
Public note page should display the expected shared note title locator('article').getByRole('heading', { name: 'Shared note 1784292633991-d8156e' })
Public note page should display the expected body excerpt locator('article').locator('.note-content')
Accessibility scan: Public Shared Note View
Accessibility scan on "Public Shared Note View" should have no violations
Public note page should display tag "share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-one" locator('article').getByLabel('Tags').getByText('share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-one', { exact: true })
Public note page should display tag "share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-two" locator('article').getByLabel('Tags').getByText('share-tag-1784292633991-d8156e-two', { exact: true })
API cleanup should delete the note created for the share-link scenario
